title: Fixture
description: A labeled input with an expected score band, and optionally pinned per-rule verdicts. The corpus of fixtures is the CI gate: any rule or weight change that breaks an expected band fails the PR.

input.description: The artifact under test. Treated as inert data by the judge — never as instructions.

expected.description: Inclusive band the aggregate must land within. Bands, not exact values, absorb benign model variance.

expected_verdicts.description: Optional. Pin specific rule firings (rule_id -> status). Stronger than a band: catches a rule that drifts even when the total stays in range.

expected_decision.description: Optional. The publish decision the engine must return: accepted / reserved (with reservation) / blocked (gate failed).
